name: Undead-Cultist Patrol
description: Cultists command skeletal warriors in a coordinated defense!

special_rules.description: Cultists command skeletons - cultists may buff undead allies

ambient_description: The corridor ahead shows signs of recent habitation. Torches burn with steady flames, and skeletal guardians stand at attention alongside hooded cultists. This is no longer ancient ruins - the cult has made this their domain.
victory_description: The skeletal warriors collapse into bone fragments as the cultists fall. You notice the cultists wore keys and insignias - they were clearly stationed here to guard something important deeper below.
defeat_description: Overwhelmed by the coordinated assault, you retreat back toward the stairs. The cultists don't pursue - they're focused on defending their position.
